---
title: "3.75 India CIAF Map"
author: "Justin Guerra"
date: "2026-05-01"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
# =============================
# 0. Libraries
# =============================
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(sf)
library(ggplot2)
library(rnaturalearth)
library(stringr)
library(here)

# =============================
# 1. Load data
# =============================
dffile <- here(data_folder, "cleaned.rda")
load(dffile)

# =============================
# 2. State-level CIAF summary
# =============================
state_summary <- df %>%
  group_by(state_ciaf_rank) %>%
  summarise(
    n_total = n(),
    n_ciaf = sum(ciaf == 1, na.rm = TRUE),
    n_non_ciaf = sum(ciaf == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    ciaf_prevalence = mean(ciaf == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  mutate(prevalence_pct = ciaf_prevalence * 100)

# =============================
# 3. Clean + standardize state names
# =============================
state_summary_clean <- state_summary %>%
  separate(state_ciaf_rank, into = c("rank", "state"), sep = "\\. ") %>%
  mutate(
    rank = as.integer(rank),
    state = str_squish(state),

    # Harmonize naming across NFHS vs shapefile
    state = dplyr::recode(state,
      "Andaman and Nicobar Islands" = "Andaman and Nicobar",
      "Andaman & Nicobar Islands" = "Andaman and Nicobar",

      "Dadra and Nagar Haveli" = "Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu",
      "Daman and Diu" = "Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu",

      "Uttaranchal" = "Uttarakhand",
      "NCT of Delhi" = "Delhi",
      "Chattisgarh" = "Chhattisgarh",

      "Orissa" = "Odisha",
      "Odissa" = "Odisha",

      "Lakshwadeep" = "Lakshadweep",
      
      "Ladakh" = "Ladakh"   # <- add this

    )
  )

# =============================
# 4. Load India shapefile
# =============================
india <- rnaturalearth::ne_states(
  country = "India",
  returnclass = "sf"
)

# =============================
# 5. Merge shapefile + CIAF data
# =============================
merged <- india %>%
  left_join(state_summary_clean, by = c("name" = "state"))


# =============================
# 7. Identify unmatched states
# =============================
missing_states <- india %>%
  anti_join(state_summary_clean, by = c("name" = "state")) %>%
  select(name)

print(missing_states)

# =============================
# 8. Final CIAF map
# =============================
p = ggplot(merged) +
  geom_sf(aes(fill = prevalence_pct), color = "white", size = 0.2) +

  scale_fill_viridis_c(
    option = "magma",
    na.value = "grey90",
    name = "CIAF (%)"
  ) +

  labs(
    title = "Child Undernutrition (CIAF) Across Indian States",
    subtitle = "NFHS-5 (2019–2021)",
  ) +

  coord_sf(datum = NA) +

  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

ggsave(
  filename = "C:/Users/justi/OneDrive/Desktop/Malnutrition_Project/infant_malnutrition_stratification/Patient Characteristics/CIAF_map.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 10,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)
```
